name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers same-day title loans and lines of credit secured by vehicle titles, accepting most credit types and allowing borrowers to keep driving their car.
description_long:
TitleMax is a title lending company that has operated since at least 2007, with the Memphis Summer Avenue location serving the greater Memphis area since February 2007. The company specializes in providing fast emergency cash solutions to consumers who may not qualify for traditional bank loans. TitleMax operates both physical store locations and online lending platforms across 11 states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI).

The company offers two primary products: (1) Title Pledges and Flex Lines of Credit secured by vehicle titles, and (2) Unsecured Flexible Lines of Credit for online and in-store customers. For title-secured loans, borrowers must provide a clear vehicle title, valid government-issued ID, and the loan amount is determined by vehicle value and ability to repay. For unsecured personal lines of credit, applicants need a valid ID, recent bank statement or proof of income, and an active bank account. Both products emphasize quick approval and same-day cash availability.

TitleMax distinguishes itself through acceptance of most credit types, allowing borrowers to keep and drive their vehicles while using the title as collateral, and offering flexible line-of-credit structures where funds can be withdrawn all at once or incrementally. The Memphis location maintains strong Google reviews (481+ reviews, 5.0/5 rating) with specific customer praise for staff members like Nicole and Joyce regarding professionalism and personalized service. The store operates extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday) and offers bilingual service.

However, title loans carry significant caveats: they are high-cost emergency borrowing products with competitive but undisclosed APRs on the website, and vehicles are at risk of repossession if payments are missed. The company's business model explicitly targets consumers with credit challenges, meaning borrowers should carefully evaluate whether a title loan or unsecured line of credit is necessary given the cost structure typical of such products.
address: 3525 S Fort Apache Rd Ste. 160, Las Vegas, NV 89147

company_info.headquarters: 3525 S Fort Apache Rd Ste. 160, Las Vegas, NV 89147

pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified applicants
Accepts most credit types, not based solely on credit score
Allows borrowers to keep driving their vehicle while it secures the loan
Offers flexible line-of-credit structures with incremental withdrawal options
Bilingual staff available at this location
Extended operating hours (9am-7pm most weekdays, Saturday hours available)
Strong local customer satisfaction with 481+ Google reviews at 5.0/5 rating
cons: Title loans are high-cost emergency products with vehicle repossession risk if payments default
APR rates not disclosed on website, making true cost comparison difficult
Requires clear vehicle title, excluding customers without clean automotive ownership
Unsecured line of credit only available in 11 specific states, excluding most of the country
Credit check still performed despite marketing to consumers with poor credit
best_for: Consumers with vehicle equity who need emergency cash within 24 hours
Borrowers with poor credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Individuals in the 11-state service area seeking fast unsecured lines of credit
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for consumers with vehicle equity who need emergency cash immediately and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans, particularly those with poor credit. The main caveat is that title loans are inherently high-cost products with vehicle repossession risk; borrowers should only use these if absolutely necessary for genuine emergencies, as the true APR and long-term cost are not transparent on the website.
services: Title pledge loans secured by vehicle titles
Flex lines of credit secured by vehicle titles
Unsecured personal lines of credit (in-store and online)
Online loan application and management portal
Credit limit increases on established lines of credit
